root.sql:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.other_code ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ) as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ) as group_name
FROM sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal WHERE 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code = '0' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.mem_type = '01' and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance > 0 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = '31/12/2021' order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ASC, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no ASC
